offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient categorization causes late tax filings. We automate transaction categorization instead of manual bookkeeping and tax filing processes.
problem: Difficulty in categorizing financial transactions and generating timely tax filings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tools sharing
try_it: Let users try transaction categorization and tax filing generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the workflow
Gather 10 short interviews from potential users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
